data.device: Bluetooth adapter name (run 'hcitool dev' to list adapters)
data.force_update: Force disconnect from BRC1H before connecting (recommended)

user.description:
Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of one BRC1H thermostat. Run this flow again to add additional thermostats.

Make sure the device has been paired:

1. Forget Bluetooth connection on BRC1H
2. bluetoothctl scan on
3. bluetoothctl scan off
4. bluetoothctl pair [BRC1H MAC]
5. Confirm when prompted
6. Confirm connection on BRC1H display
user.title: Configure Daikin Madoka
